name: Bam Baap (Korean Chestnut Rice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the rice in cold water and drain thoroughly.
2. Peel the chestnuts, removing both the outer brown skin and the inner thin skin lining. Cut large chestnuts into halves or leave small ones whole.
3. Combine the rice, peeled chestnuts, and water in a pot. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for about 15 minutes. Stir occasionally toward the end of cooking until all water is absorbed and chestnuts are softened.
Serve warm. Serves 6 at Korean meals.
